institution.name: State University of New York at New Paltz

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at State University of New York at New Paltz rose 40% between 2006 and 2009 ($4.3k → $6.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at State University of New York at New Paltz fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at State University of New York at New Paltz rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 (58.7% → 68.9%).
